name: Add Social Media Accounts to your Webstore
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto\u00a0supports a range of social media profiles on your website:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Facebook"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Twitter"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "LinkedIn"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pinterest"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Google+"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Instagram"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "YouTube"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tumblr"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Business Details", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Copy and paste the full web address of the applicable social media page into the corresponding fields."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Social media icons will now automatically display your website front end like the example below."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "[Image: image2]"}]}]
